problem.title: Integer Break
problem.description: Given an integer n, break it into the sum of k positive integers, where k >= 2, and maximize the product of those integers.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming
solutions.description: Build a dp array where dp[i] represents the maximum product achievable when i is broken into at least two parts. For each value i we try every split point j, taking the best product between keeping j as-is or using its own dp value (dp[j]), and similarly for the remainder (i-j). The key insight is that dp[j] already captures the optimal further splitting of j, so the two-pointer split covers all multi-way partitions without explicit recursion.
